from functools import lru_cache
import hashlib

@lru_cache(maxsize=1024)
def get_user_profile(user_id):
    return {"id": user_id, "name": f"User {user_id}"}

def hash_user_input(user_id, raw_input):
    return hashlib.sha256(raw_input.encode()).hexdigest()

def get_user_session(session_token):
    return {"token": session_token, "data": "session_data"}

def process_request(user_id, body, session_token):
    h = hash_user_input(user_id, body)
    session = get_user_session(session_token)
    profile = get_user_profile(user_id)
    return {"hash": h, "session": session, "profile": profile}
